title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 125
raw_text:
of distribution. Also the Auroras ("Dawn"). Acting as cathode ray tube to
produce TV-screen-like effects. Receives magnetic storms and ions from Sun.
Disturbances, solar flares ... all these are characteristics of Ubik. (Dream of
"people renting space above ceiling of store who leave notes on bulletin
board. Dream, too, of the Bob Silverberg Commission, which is investigating
something—for U.S. Government.")
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
